name: Sandbox
description: You stand in an infinite void, a canvas of endless possibility where your will shapes reality itself. With a thought, you can forge sprawling worlds, summon allies or adversaries, bend the laws of existence, or craft artifacts of unimaginable power. You may linger in this formless expanse, molding it to your whims, or plunge into a universe of your own design, where your abilities remain yours to wield openly or conceal in shadow. Grant others the spark of your power—fully or in fragments—or keep its boundless potential locked within you. Every choice is yours, and the reality you weave responds in kind, alive with the consequences of your actions.
creator: Sososo56
